text: I've had a vague sense of fatigue, thought I'd get it checked out.
label: migraine/discharge

text: I'm extremely ill — high fever that won't break, severe muscle aches, bad dry cough, completely wiped out. 3 day(s) and getting worse, and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it. Breathing is very laboured.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I have a chesty cough with a bit of phlegm and some tightness in my chest. 4 day(s) now.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I have a bad productive cough — bringing up yellowish phlegm — and it hurts to breathe deeply. 4 day(s) like this, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. Breathing is very laboured.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 1 day(s) in.
label: influenza/mild

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 4 day(s), and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Nothing dramatic, just wanted a routine check.
label: uti/discharge

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 4 day(s). I'm struggling to breathe.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I'm probably fine, but I've been feeling off and wanted to be sure.
label: migraine/discharge

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 3 day(s) — nothing terrible yet. My heart feels a little fast.
label: influenza/mild

text: Gasping with each breath, sharp chest pain, high fever, thick productive cough. 9 day(s) now, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Felt a bit run-down this week, might be stress.
label: non-infectious

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 9 day(s) now. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 6 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: influenza/moderate

text: It hit me fast — fever, chills, splitting headache, muscle pain everywhere. Been in bed 3 day(s), and I'm really worried because it's getting worse.
label: influenza/mild

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 6 day(s), and it seems to be escalating.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Productive cough and slightly short of breath climbing stairs. 8 day(s) like this, though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: influenza/mild

text: I think I'm coming down with something — bit of a fever, muscle aches, dry cough, 12 day(s) now, though it seems to be slowly resolving. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 8 day(s).
label: influenza/moderate

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 7 day(s) and scared. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 9 day(s) and scared.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Sharp pain in my chest when I breathe in, productive cough, fever. Worsened over 12 day(s). I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Sharp pain in my chest when I breathe in, productive cough, fever. Worsened over 12 day(s). I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 8 day(s) — nothing terrible yet, though it seems to be slowly resolving.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 3 day(s), though I notice it's not improving.
label: influenza/mild

text: I feel mostly fine, just a little less energetic than usual.
label: uti/discharge

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 5 day(s), and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I feel like something might be wrong — I can't put my finger on it.
label: non-infectious
